sample_records.file_name: Readme Document for IMS Bearing Data.pdf
sample_records.content:
1 
 
IMS Bearing Data 
 
The data was generated by  the NSF I/UCR Center for Intelligent Maintenance Systems (IMS – 
www.imscenter.net) with support from Rexnord Corp. in Milwaukee, WI. 
 
Test Rig Setup 
Four bearings were installed on a shaft. The rotation speed was kept constant at 2000 RPM by an AC 
motor coupled to the shaft via rub belts.  A radial load of 6000 lb s is applied onto the shaft and bearing 
by a spring mechanism. All bearings are force lubricated. 
Rexnord ZA-2115 double row ... [944 chars total]

by a spring mechanism. All bearings are force lubricated.

numpy = numpy._core.lib.pkgconfig

[array_api]
